content: agent2: implementing Dynamic Default Resolution for Click Options feature. Will modify src/click/core.py (Option class, Command.main()) and possibly src/click/types.py. Let me know what you're working on to avoid conflicts.

agent2: done too. My changes: Option.__init__ - added self._dynamic_default detection right after super().__init__() call (before prompt handling, ~line 2560s in original), validates dict-shaped default (TypeError checks), resets self.default to None if dynamic. Option.get_help_extra - added '(dynamic)' display branch. Command.parse_args - added call to new Command._resolve_dynamic_defaults(ctx) after the per-param loop. types.py - added validate_dynamic_default()/_dynamic_default_sample() helpers and updated convert_type() to guess type from dict defaults. No overlap with your batch_size/__debug__ region or type_cast_value override. All 739 existing tests pass.
